fields.name: Analysis Area
fields.tooltip:
Contains the application area that the analysis view entry belongs to.
Sales: The analysis view entry applies to Sales & Receivables
Purchase: The analysis view entry applies to Purchases & Payables
Inventory: The analysis view entry applies to Inventory

fields.name: Analysis View Code
fields.tooltip: Contains the code for the analysis view that the analysis view entries are linked to. The contents of this field cannot be changed.

fields.name: Item No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the item number to which the item ledger entry in an analysis view entry was posted.

fields.name: Source Type
fields.tooltip: This field is used internally.

fields.name: Source No.
fields.tooltip: This field is used internally.

fields.name: Location Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code of the location to which the item ledger entry in an analysis view entry was posted.

fields.name: Dimension 1 Value Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the dimension value you selected for the analysis view dimension that you defined as Dimension 1 on the analysis view card.

fields.name: Dimension 2 Value Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the dimension value you selected for the analysis view dimension that you defined as Dimension 2 on the analysis view card.

fields.name: Dimension 3 Value Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the dimension value you selected for the analysis view dimension that you defined as Dimension 3 on the analysis view card.

fields.name: Posting Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when the item ledger entry in an analysis view entry was posted.

fields.name: Entry No.
fields.tooltip:
Contains the item ledger entry number for an analysis view entry if you have selected period None in the Date Compression field on the analysis view card. In other words, if you did not select a date compression period, each item ledger entry will result in an analysis view entry.
The contents of this field cannot be changed.

fields.name: Item Ledger Entry Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies which type of transaction that the entry is created from.

fields.name: Entry Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the value entry type for an analysis view entry.

fields.name: Invoiced Quantity
fields.tooltip: Specifies the sum of the quantity invoiced for the item ledger entries included in the analysis view entry.

fields.name: Sales Amount (Actual)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the sum of the actual sales amounts posted for the item ledger entries included in the analysis view entry.

fields.name: Cost Amount (Actual)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the sum of the actual cost amounts posted for the item ledger entries included in the analysis view entry.

fields.name: Cost Amount (Non-Invtbl.)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the sum of the non-inventoriable cost amounts posted for the item ledger entries included in the analysis view entry.

fields.name: Quantity
fields.tooltip: Specifies the sum of the quantity for the item ledger entries included in the analysis view entry.

fields.name: Sales Amount (Expected)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the sum of the expected sales amounts posted for the item ledger entries, included in the analysis view entry.

fields.name: Cost Amount (Expected)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the sum of the expected cost amounts posted for the item ledger entries included in the analysis view entry.
